_meta.purpose: Internet Archive (Wayback) snapshots of the live GitHub Pages dashboard, recorded immediately after Pages was enabled (Task 35). Documents the visual state of the dashboard at v0.1.0-development. Will be re-snapshotted at Task 36 after Task 27 produces the real-data atlas.csv.
_meta.rendered_atlas_source: tests/fixtures/atlas_baseline_micro.csv (fixture-mode; Task 27 will refresh with real atlas.csv)

pages_root.note: root URL redirects to /dashboard/ via meta refresh; Wayback resolves the redirect
